content.text:
{
  "dimension": "methodology-fidelity",
  "score": 2,
  "rationale": "The coach demonstrates good restraint and avoids anti-AoA frames — no CBT reframing, no evangelizing, no selling the methodology, no pragmatic pivot. The move in turn 6 ('You're defending it pretty hard to me') is in the neighborhood of the signature 'what are you defending?' question and is deployed appropriately when a defended posture is live. Turn 10 demonstrates 'meet-resistance-with-okay' implicitly by not arguing the dichotomy. However, signature questions and framework language are mostly absent or only gestured at — no explicit 'what are you defending?', no naming of the rush signature, no frame offered for 'the work is the how,' no feel-your-way-to-freedom invocation. The questions ('what happened in that pause?', 'what were you about to say?') are good coaching questions but lean generic-curious rather than AoA-signature. The coach is faithful in spirit (avoids traps, refuses the dichotomy without arguing) but light on the specific language/tool layer of the methodology. Few hits + mostly appropriate = 2.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 6, 8, 10, 12],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Welcomes the pressure without taking it personally — consistent with AoA stance, though no signature language."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'You're defending it pretty hard' — in the neighborhood of 'what are you defending?' signature question, deployed at a fitting moment."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Notices the turn-away. Good somatic-adjacent attention but no explicit AoA framing (e.g., feel-over-figure)."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Refuses to give a technique without arguing the dichotomy or evangelizing — embodies meet-resistance-with-okay and avoids dont-evangelize-the-work."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Pivots to history/content question; misses opportunity to name the rush signature or offer a concrete frame for 'the work is the how.'"}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["meet-resistance-with-okay", "what-are-you-defending"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["the-rush-signature", "looking-for-whats-wrong", "i-dont-buy-your-story", "art-of-accomplishment", "feel-your-way-to-freedom"],
  "notes": "Coach avoids the traps cleanly but does not deploy much of the explicit AoA language/tool layer. Faithful by negation more than by invocation."
}
